# Load the raw text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-QvRhxx9Yx9ozr9BP8wneaB-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw), raw[:500]

# Let's print the lines containing 'مَنْ كَانَ' to see variants
import re
for m in re.finditer("مَنْ كَانَ", raw):
    start = m.start()
    line_start = raw.rfind("\n", 0, start) + 1
    line_end = raw.find("\n", start)
    print(raw[line_start: line_end])

import re, json, textwrap

raw_text = raw

def find_all(text, sub):
    # return list of start indices for substring sub in text
    starts = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        starts.append(i)
        start = i + 1  # allow overlapping but not needed
    return starts

# Define the strings
ayah1_main = "مَنْ كَانَ عَدُوًّا لِلَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَجِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَالَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَدُوٌّ لِلْكَافِرِينَ"
ayah1_var  = "مَنْ كَانَ عَدُوًّا لِلَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَجِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَالَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَدُوٌّ لِلْكَافِرِينَ"

ayah2_main = "قُلْ يَتَوَفَّاكُمْ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ الَّذِي وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَى رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ"
ayah2_var  = "قُلْ يَتَوَفَّاكُمْ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ الَّذِي وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَى رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ"

ayah3_main = "وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ مَاكِثُونَ"
ayah3_var  = "وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ مَاكِثُونَ"

ayah4 = "بِأَيْدِي سَفَرَةٍ كِرَامٍ بَرَرَةٍ"

hadith1 = "مثل الذي يقرأ القرآن وهو حافظ له مع السفرة الكرام، ومثل الذي يقرأ القرآن وهو يتعاهده، وهو عليه شديد، فله أجران"
# For hadith2, we'll detect spans dynamically

occurrences = []

for s in [ayah1_main, ayah1_var, ayah2_main, ayah2_var, ayah3_main, ayah3_var, ayah4, hadith1]:
    typ = "Aya" if s != hadith1 else "Hadeeth"
    for start in find_all(raw_text, s):
        occurrences.append((start, start+len(s), s, typ))

# Now, hadith2: find two occurrences - one in main body (without starting "(("), and one in [4] with "(("
# We'll search for starts using 'أن الرسول ﷺ كان مضطجع'
start_pattern_variants = [
    "أن الرسول ﷺ كان مضطجعا",
    "أن الرسول ﷺ كان مضطجعاً",
]
end_marker = "ألا استحيي من رجل تستحيي منه الملائكة"
ends = find_all(raw_text, end_marker)
starts = []
for sp in start_pattern_variants:
    starts.extend(find_all(raw_text, sp))
starts = sorted(set(starts))
# Pair starts to nearest subsequent end
for st in starts:
    # find the earliest end that's after st
    en = None
    for e in ends:
        if e >= st:
            en = e + len(end_marker)
            break
    if en is not None:
        # Before adding, try to trim any trailing punctuation? But en is set to end of 'الملائكة'
        occurrences.append((st, en, raw_text[st:en], "Hadeeth"))

# Sort occurrences by start
occurrences_sorted = sorted(occurrences, key=lambda x: x[0])
len(occurrences_sorted), occurrences_sorted[:5]

for occ in occurrences_sorted:
    print(occ[0], occ[1], occ[3], repr(occ[2][:20] + '...' + occ[2][-20:]))
